title: The First 1,225 Steps
overview: Manga artist Suzugamori Chika goes on a journey guided by poll results. Her first destination: Aizuwakamatsu.

title: The Real Deal! A Lively Journey for Two
overview: Chika visits Matsushima alone and feels a little lonely. Koyomi joins her journey to Kurobe in Toyama.

title: Perfect the Way It Is
overview: Chika and her junior Yui go on their first journey together to Takamatsu, Kagawa, in the Shikoku region.

title: Smile by the Sea
overview: Chika travels to Kyoto with manga artists Fuyune and Riri and gets inspired by their creative process.

title: Crows, Dragons, Soba, and a Remote Island
overview: Chika journeys to Tochigi alone and then to Awashima with Koyomi.

title: An Epic Midsummer Journey!
overview: Chika's Awashima journey with Koyomi ends, and Yui joins for "The Epic Summer Journey: Tokyo Arc."

title: A City Where You Can Meet Gods? And Then...
overview: Chika visits the Ise Shrine with Riri. Then, Yoshimoto sends her off on a night bus trip with Yui and Fuyune.

title: Three Girls, Cozy and Full of Laughs
overview: Chika explores Hiroshima with Fuyune and Yui. She then produces a draft that gets approved by her editor.

title: Completion at the Hot Spring, Then the First Sunrise
overview: Chika goes on a solo journey to Aomori and then to Wakayama to see the first sunrise of the year.

title: Home in My Heart
overview: After Chika returns from her solo journey in Wakayama, Koyomi joins her for a journey to Hanamaki in Iwate.

title: A Pilgrimage with Master
overview: Chika visits Izumo-Taisha in Shimane with Fuyune, where she finds out that Fuyune and Riri had an argument.

title: That's Journey
overview: Riri makes a surprise appearance, inspiring Chika. Yoshimoto offers Chika a shot to get her one-off published.
